page_metadata.biotools__summary: Seq2Fun is an ultra-fast, all-in-one functional profiling tool for RNA-seq data analysis for organisms without reference genomes. Seq2Fun can finish a typical RNA-seq dataset within several hours on a standard PC in stead of several days or even weeks by conventional RNA-seq workflow on a high-performance server.
